User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap (generated by sphinx_sitemap)
Sitemap: https://moabb.neurotechx.com/docs/sitemap.xml

# LLM-friendly documentation (llms.txt standard)
# llms.txt: https://moabb.neurotechx.com/docs/llms.txt
# llms-full.txt: https://moabb.neurotechx.com/docs/llms-full.txt

# Disallow auto-generated indices (duplicate/thin content)
Disallow: /docs/py-modindex.html
Disallow: /docs/genindex.html
Disallow: /docs/search.html

# Disallow raw RST source files (no user value)
Disallow: /docs/_sources/

Crawl-delay: 2

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# AI Crawlers — explicitly allow for AI search and retrieval visibility
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

# OpenAI
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

# Anthropic
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: Claude-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-User
Allow: /

# Perplexity
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Google AI
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Meta AI
User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

# Microsoft / Bing AI
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
